name: MCP Server
description: MCP tool server over stdio transport exposing three tools: exemplar_review (accepts diff text or file path, config overrides, format preference; returns formatted ReviewReport), exemplar_trust (returns current trust scores as structured data), exemplar_history (accepts query parameters, returns matching past reviews from Kindex). Uses same core pipeline as CLI via injected PipelineProtocol. Implements MCP protocol message handling (JSON-RPC over stdio). Tool schemas generated from frozen Pydantic v2 models. Async request handling. All logging to stderr; stdout reserved exclusively for JSON-RPC protocol traffic.

types.name: ReviewToolInput

fields.name: diff_text
fields.description: Raw unified diff text to review. Mutually sufficient with file_path; at least one must be provided.

validators.error_message: diff_text must be between 1 and 1MB of text when provided

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: Path to a diff file on disk. Mutually sufficient with diff_text; at least one must be provided.

validators.error_message: file_path must be a non-empty string up to 4096 characters

fields.name: config_overrides
fields.description: Optional key-value config overrides applied on top of the base ExemplarConfig for this review invocation. Keys and values are strings.

fields.name: format
fields.description: Desired output format for the review report.

types.description: Frozen Pydantic v2 input model for the exemplar_review tool. At least one of diff_text or file_path must be provided. Generates MCP-compatible JSON Schema via model_json_schema().

types.name: TrustToolInput

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Optional filter to retrieve trust score for a specific reviewer. If None, returns all scores.

validators.error_message: reviewer_id must be 1-128 alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen, or dot characters

types.description: Frozen Pydantic v2 input model for the exemplar_trust tool. No required fields; returns all current trust scores.

types.name: HistoryToolInput

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Filter reviews by tags. Returns entries matching any of the provided tags.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: Filter reviews by kind/category (e.g. 'security', 'correctness').

validators.error_message: kind must be 1-64 alphanumeric, underscore, or hyphen characters

fields.name: date_from
fields.description: ISO 8601 date string for the start of the query range (inclusive).

validators.error_message: date_from must be a valid ISO 8601 date or datetime string

fields.name: date_to
fields.description: ISO 8601 date string for the end of the query range (inclusive).

validators.error_message: date_to must be a valid ISO 8601 date or datetime string

fields.name: limit
fields.description: Maximum number of results to return.

fields.name: offset
fields.description: Pagination offset for result set.

types.description: Frozen Pydantic v2 input model for the exemplar_history tool. All fields optional; returns matching past reviews from Kindex.

types.name: ToolError

fields.name: error_type
fields.description: Classification of the error: 'validation_error', 'pipeline_error', 'io_error', 'internal_error'.

validators.error_message: error_type must be one of: validation_error, pipeline_error, io_error, internal_error

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable error summary.

fields.name: field_errors
fields.description: Field-level validation error details, present when error_type is 'validation_error'.

fields.name: pact_key
fields.description: PACT attribution key identifying the tool handler that produced this error.

types.description: Frozen Pydantic v2 model for structured MCP tool error responses. Serialized with isError=True in the MCP content block.

types.name: FieldError

fields.name: field
fields.description: Dotted path to the invalid field (e.g. 'config_overrides.severity_threshold').

fields.name: message
fields.description: Description of the validation failure.

fields.name: input_value
fields.description: String representation of the rejected value, if safe to include.

types.description: Per-field validation error detail within a ToolError.

types.name: McpContentBlock

fields.name: type
fields.description: Content block type, always 'text' for this server's responses.

fields.name: text
fields.description: Serialized JSON payload (ReviewReport, list[TrustScore], list[KindexEntry], or ToolError).

types.description: A single MCP tool result content block. The MCP SDK uses this shape for tool responses.

types.name: McpToolResult

fields.name: content
fields.description: One or more content blocks containing the tool output.

fields.name: isError
fields.description: True if this result represents an error condition.

types.description: MCP tool call result shape returned from tool handlers.

types.name: PipelineProtocol

fields.name: run_review
fields.description: Async callable: (diff_text: str, config: ExemplarConfig) -> ReviewReport

fields.name: get_trust_scores
fields.description: Async callable: (reviewer_id: Optional[str]) -> list[TrustScore]

fields.name: query_history
fields.description: Async callable: (tags, kind, date_from, date_to, limit, offset) -> list[KindexEntry]

types.description: Runtime-checkable Protocol defining the core pipeline interface that the MCP server depends on. Allows dependency injection and test mocking of the pipeline layer. Implementation must provide run_review, get_trust_scores, and query_history async methods.

types.name: ServerConfig

fields.name: server_name
fields.description: MCP server name reported in initialization.

validators.error_message: server_name must be 1-64 alphanumeric, underscore, or hyphen characters

fields.name: server_version
fields.description: Semantic version string for the MCP server.

validators.error_message: server_version must be a valid semver string

fields.name: enable_chronicler
fields.description: Whether to emit Chronicler events from tool handlers. Fire-and-forget when enabled.

fields.name: max_diff_size_bytes
fields.description: Maximum allowed diff size in bytes (1MB default).

types.description: Configuration subset relevant to the MCP server: server name, version metadata, and optional feature flags.

functions.name: create_server
functions.description: Factory function that creates and configures an mcp.Server instance with all three tools registered (exemplar_review, exemplar_trust, exemplar_history). The pipeline and config are injected, allowing tests to call tool handlers directly without stdio transport. PACT key: PACT:exemplar:mcp_server:create_server.

inputs.name: pipeline
inputs.description: Injected core pipeline implementing run_review, get_trust_scores, and query_history.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Server configuration. Uses defaults if not provided.

error_cases.name: invalid_pipeline
error_cases.condition: pipeline does not satisfy PipelineProtocol at runtime

error_data.message: pipeline must implement PipelineProtocol (run_review, get_trust_scores, query_history)

preconditions: config is a valid ServerConfig instance
postconditions: Returned mcp.Server has exactly 3 tools registered: exemplar_review, exemplar_trust, exemplar_history
Each tool's JSON schema matches the corresponding ToolInput model's model_json_schema()
Server is not yet running (no transport bound)

structured_side_effects.description: Pure factory function; no I/O or state mutation beyond object creation.

functions.name: run_server
functions.description: Async entry point that binds the mcp.Server to stdio transport and runs the JSON-RPC message loop until the transport closes. Called from CLI or __main__. Blocks until stdin EOF or shutdown signal. PACT key: PACT:exemplar:mcp_server:run_server.

inputs.name: server
inputs.description: A configured mcp.Server instance as returned by create_server().

error_cases.name: stdio_unavailable
error_cases.condition: stdin or stdout is closed or unavailable

error_data.message: stdio transport requires open stdin and stdout

error_cases.name: transport_error
error_cases.condition: Unrecoverable error in the MCP stdio transport layer

preconditions: server was created via create_server() with a valid pipeline
stdin and stdout are available file descriptors
stdout is not being written to by any other component (reserved for JSON-RPC)
postconditions: Server has cleanly shut down and released stdio handles
No orphaned async tasks remain

structured_side_effects.description: Reads JSON-RPC request messages from stdin.
Writes JSON-RPC response messages to stdout. No other content is written to stdout.
All server logging output directed to stderr via Python logging module.

functions.name: handle_review
functions.description: Tool handler for exemplar_review. Validates ReviewToolInput, reads diff from text or file, applies config overrides, runs the review pipeline, formats the report, and returns an McpToolResult. Emits chronicler events (review.started, review.complete) around pipeline execution. Never raises unhandled exceptions. PACT key: PACT:exemplar:mcp_server:handle_review.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Validated tool input containing diff source and options.

error_cases.name: validation_error
error_cases.condition: ReviewToolInput fails Pydantic validation (e.g. neither diff_text nor file_path provided)

error_cases.name: file_not_found
error_cases.condition: file_path is provided but the file does not exist or is not readable

error_data.message: Diff file not found or not readable

error_cases.name: diff_too_large
error_cases.condition: Diff content exceeds max_diff_size_bytes from ServerConfig

error_cases.name: pipeline_failure
error_cases.condition: Core review pipeline raises an exception during execution

preconditions: At least one of input.diff_text or input.file_path is not None
If input.file_path is provided, the file exists and is readable
Pipeline has been injected via create_server()
postconditions: Result contains exactly one McpContentBlock of type 'text'
If isError is false, content.text is valid JSON deserializable to ReviewReport
If isError is true, content.text is valid JSON deserializable to ToolError
Chronicler review.started event was emitted (fire-and-forget) before pipeline invocation
Chronicler review.complete event was emitted (fire-and-forget) after pipeline invocation

structured_side_effects.description: Reads diff content from disk when file_path is provided instead of diff_text.
Emits review.started and review.complete events to Chronicler. Fire-and-forget; failures are logged but do not affect the result.
Logs handler entry, pipeline invocation, and completion or error to stderr.

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n is diff size in lines

functions.name: handle_trust
functions.description: Tool handler for exemplar_trust. Validates TrustToolInput, retrieves current trust scores via the pipeline, and returns them as structured JSON in an McpToolResult. Never raises unhandled exceptions. PACT key: PACT:exemplar:mcp_server:handle_trust.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Validated tool input with optional reviewer_id filter.

error_cases.name: pipeline_failure
error_cases.condition: Trust score retrieval raises an exception in the pipeline

preconditions: Pipeline has been injected via create_server()
postconditions: Result contains exactly one McpContentBlock of type 'text'
If isError is false, content.text is valid JSON deserializable to list of TrustScore objects
If isError is true, content.text is valid JSON deserializable to ToolError

structured_side_effects.description: Logs handler entry and completion or error to stderr.

performance_budget.complexity: O(r) where r is number of reviewers

functions.name: handle_history
functions.description: Tool handler for exemplar_history. Validates HistoryToolInput, queries Kindex for matching past reviews via the pipeline, and returns them as structured JSON in an McpToolResult. Never raises unhandled exceptions. PACT key: PACT:exemplar:mcp_server:handle_history.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Validated tool input with optional query filters and pagination.

error_cases.name: validation_error
error_cases.condition: HistoryToolInput fails Pydantic validation (e.g. invalid date format, limit out of range)

error_data.message: date_from must not be after date_to

error_cases.name: pipeline_failure
error_cases.condition: Kindex query raises an exception in the pipeline

preconditions: Pipeline has been injected via create_server()
If date_from and date_to are both provided, date_from <= date_to
postconditions: Result contains exactly one McpContentBlock of type 'text'
If isError is false, content.text is valid JSON deserializable to list of KindexEntry objects
If isError is true, content.text is valid JSON deserializable to ToolError
Returned list length <= input.limit

structured_side_effects.description: Logs handler entry, query parameters, and completion or error to stderr.

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n is number of matched Kindex entries up to limit

functions.name: build_tool_error
functions.description: Pure helper that constructs a ToolError and wraps it in an McpToolResult with isError=True. Used by all tool handlers for consistent error response formatting. PACT key: PACT:exemplar:mcp_server:build_tool_error.

validators.error_message: error_type must be one of the defined error classifications

inputs.name: pact_key
inputs.description: PACT attribution key of the calling handler.

postconditions: Returned McpToolResult.isError is True
Returned content has exactly one McpContentBlock of type 'text'
content.text is valid JSON deserializable to ToolError

structured_side_effects.description: Pure function; constructs error response without I/O.

functions.name: build_success_result
functions.description: Pure helper that serializes a Pydantic model (or list of models) to deterministic JSON and wraps it in an McpToolResult with isError=False. PACT key: PACT:exemplar:mcp_server:build_success_result.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: A frozen Pydantic model or list of frozen Pydantic models to serialize. Must support model_dump_json() or be a list of such objects.

error_cases.name: serialization_error
error_cases.condition: data cannot be serialized to JSON (not a valid Pydantic model)

error_data.message: Data must be a Pydantic BaseModel or list of BaseModel instances

preconditions: data is a Pydantic BaseModel instance or a list of Pydantic BaseModel instances
postconditions: Returned McpToolResult.isError is False
Returned content has exactly one McpContentBlock of type 'text'
content.text is deterministic JSON (sorted keys, no extra whitespace beyond standard compact form)

structured_side_effects.description: Pure function; serializes data without I/O.

invariants: stdout is exclusively reserved for JSON-RPC protocol traffic; no logging or diagnostic output may be written to stdout
All logging output is written to stderr via Python logging module
Tool handlers never raise unhandled exceptions; all errors are caught and returned as McpToolResult with isError=True
All tool input models are frozen Pydantic v2 models (frozen=True)
All public functions carry a PACT key for Sentinel attribution
Chronicler event emission is fire-and-forget: unreachable Chronicler does not block or fail tool responses
Tool JSON schemas are generated from Pydantic model_json_schema() and are deterministic
JSON serialization in tool responses is deterministic (sorted keys) for testability
The MCP server holds no mutable state between requests; all state is in the injected pipeline
ReviewToolInput requires at least one of diff_text or file_path to be non-None (model-level validator)

data_access.rationale: Reads diff content (INTERNAL: source code from pull requests which may contain secrets or proprietary logic). Reads trust scores (INTERNAL: reviewer reliability metrics). Reads Kindex history entries (INTERNAL: past review results; may reference PII such as author names or email addresses in commit metadata). Writes Chronicler events (INTERNAL: review lifecycle telemetry including diff hashes and timing data). Does not persist any data directly; all persistence is delegated to pipeline components.

side_effects.rationale: Reads source code diffs from stdin (via JSON-RPC) or from disk paths provided by the caller. Diff content is proprietary source code classified as INTERNAL.
Emits review.started and review.complete Chronicler events containing review identifiers, diff hashes, and timing data for governance audit trails.
Reads JSON-RPC requests from stdin and writes JSON-RPC responses to stdout. Payloads may contain source code diffs and review results classified as INTERNAL.
Queries Kindex for past review entries which may contain author PII (names, emails) embedded in commit metadata. Query parameters themselves do not contain PII but results may.

authority.rationale: The MCP Server is the sole authority for MCP tool schema definitions (ReviewToolInput, TrustToolInput, HistoryToolInput JSON schemas) and the stdio transport lifecycle (server creation, startup, shutdown). No other component defines MCP tool interfaces or manages the JSON-RPC transport.
